untranslatable_reason: Cup-Handle pattern formation and steeper decline metrics cannot be directly expressed with available indicators. Pattern requires multi-bar structure analysis and relative slope comparison not supported by single-bar indicator conditions. Approximated entry with downward breakout, bear trend confirmation (ADX > 25, price below 200-MA), and Donchian lower breakout, but true cup-handle geometry and comparative decline steepness are not translatable.
